text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"Classes are over! I did my best in training again!
#ItsBreakTime for #CuteCurrenChan"

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Great work, Curren Chan! Where are you heading
now?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! ♪ I'm off to find the kind of cuteness that
can put a smile on everyone's face! ☆

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Sh-she's so cute!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Curren Chan. She uses the handle "Curren"
on social media and is incredibly popular.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the moment, however, another Umamusume is
gazing intently at her from a distance...
choice_data_list:
Do you need to talk to Curren about something,
Yaeno?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Waaagh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You startled me... Please refrain from doing that.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... You asked whether I have business with
Curren, yes? The answer is that I do not.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, I find that Curren carries herself in a
splendid manner, and thus I decided to observe
her.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Despite leading a busy life with an arduous
training regimen, she still manages to maintain a
high frequency of posts on Umastagram.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And the quality of her content remains
consistently high. As a result, her Umasta page is
extremely cute.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm?! I... I would not claim to be a fan. As a
practitioner of the Kongo Yaegaki style, my heart
remains steadfast!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Well, p-perhaps it wavers slightly... but Curren
does not rely on her innate cuteness alone—she is
always refining her craft...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And that is why I hold the utmost respect for her.
I hesitate to call myself a fan, however—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hm? Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea you were a fan of mine, Yaeno. I'm
so happy! My heart skipped a beat just now! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We should totally run together sometime! I hope
you'll keep cheering me on! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I want to protect you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I can deny it no longer! I simply cannot bear to
forsake so lovely a flower!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I must protect you using my Kongo Yaegaki style!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I implore you! Please allow me to defend you from
harm!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this is amazing! ♪ Have I finally reached
bodyguard-level popularity?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I don't know what to do! I'm really pleased
you want to keep me safe, but I think having
security might be a teensy bit much...
choice_data_list: It'll be fine! Let her protect you!
Maybe you should try calming her down first.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right! I've gotta match the energy of
my fans!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Will you protect my cuteness, Yaeno? Pretty
please! ☆

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for agreeing to this interview Curren
Chan. It's very much appreciated.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You're very welcome. ♪

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: S-so first off... Um, uhh...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, who is that intimidating individual behind
you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yaeno is my valiant knight. ☆

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Your "knight"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan later tells me that, perhaps due to
Yaeno Muteki's intimidating aura, the reporter's
questions were far less pointed than usual.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Great idea! I'm just so cute that she can't think
straight! Okay, so what should I do?
choice_data_list: You're going to have to say uncute things!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whaaat? I don't think I know how. ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I mean, I've never not been cute—not even for a millisecond! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Curren Chan is so CUUUTE!
